name: FRED: Money, Banking, & Finance
provider: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
description: Money, Banking, & Finance — approximately 120,000 time series. FRED is the largest free economic database with 800K+ series from 100+ sources. Requires free API key for programmatic access.

name: FRED: Population, Employment, & Labor Markets
provider: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
description: Population, Employment, & Labor Markets — approximately 150,000 time series. FRED is the largest free economic database with 800K+ series from 100+ sources. Requires free API key for programmatic access.

name: FRED: National Accounts
provider: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
description: National Accounts — approximately 50,000 time series. FRED is the largest free economic database with 800K+ series from 100+ sources. Requires free API key for programmatic access.

name: FRED: Production & Business Activity
provider: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
description: Production & Business Activity — approximately 40,000 time series. FRED is the largest free economic database with 800K+ series from 100+ sources. Requires free API key for programmatic access.

name: FRED: Prices
provider: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
description: Prices — approximately 80,000 time series. FRED is the largest free economic database with 800K+ series from 100+ sources. Requires free API key for programmatic access.

name: FRED: International Data
provider: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
description: International Data — approximately 100,000 time series. FRED is the largest free economic database with 800K+ series from 100+ sources. Requires free API key for programmatic access.

name: FRED: U.S. Regional Data
provider: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
description: U.S. Regional Data — approximately 200,000 time series. FRED is the largest free economic database with 800K+ series from 100+ sources. Requires free API key for programmatic access.

name: FRED: Academic Data
provider: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
description: Academic Data — approximately 20,000 time series. FRED is the largest free economic database with 800K+ series from 100+ sources. Requires free API key for programmatic access.

name: FRED: Sources/Releases
provider: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
description: Sources/Releases — approximately 37,000 time series. FRED is the largest free economic database with 800K+ series from 100+ sources. Requires free API key for programmatic access.

name: SEC EDGAR: Annual Reports (Form 10-K)
description: Annual financial reports filed by public companies

name: SEC EDGAR: Quarterly Reports (Form 10-Q)
description: Quarterly financial reports filed by public companies

name: SEC EDGAR: Current Reports (Form 8-K)
description: Reports of material events or corporate changes

name: SEC EDGAR: Proxy Statements (Form DEF-14A)
description: Definitive proxy statements for shareholder meetings

name: SEC EDGAR: Institutional Holdings (Form 13F-HR)
description: Quarterly holdings reports from institutional investment managers

name: SEC EDGAR: Beneficial Ownership (>5%) (Form SC-13D)
description: Reports of >5% beneficial ownership in public companies

name: SEC EDGAR: Insider Transactions (Form 4)
description: Changes in insider ownership (officers, directors, 10%+ owners)

name: SEC EDGAR: IPO Registration (Form S-1)
description: Registration statements for initial public offerings

name: SEC EDGAR: Foreign Private Issuer Annual (Form 20-F)
description: Annual reports from foreign private issuers

name: SEC EDGAR: Fund Annual Reports (Form N-CSR)
description: Certified shareholder reports for registered investment companies

name: SEC EDGAR: XBRL Company Facts
description: All XBRL financial data for 10,400+ public companies, queryable by CIK

name: SEC EDGAR: XBRL Company Concept
description: Specific XBRL taxonomy concept for a company over time

name: SEC EDGAR: XBRL Frames
description: Aggregated XBRL values across all filers for a concept in a period

name: SEC EDGAR: Company Tickers
description: Mapping of 10,426 CIK numbers to ticker symbols and company names

name: SEC EDGAR: Company Submissions
description: All filings by a company including recent and historical

name: FAOSTAT: Crops and livestock products
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Production quantity, area harvested, yield for crops and livestock. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Value of Agricultural Production
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Gross and net production value in constant and current prices. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Food Balance Sheets
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Supply and utilization accounts for food commodities. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Supply Utilization Accounts
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Detailed supply, demand and utilization by commodity. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Trade - Crops and livestock products
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Import/export quantities and values for agricultural commodities. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Trade Indices
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Trade value and volume indices for agricultural products. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Producer Prices
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Annual producer prices for agricultural commodities. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Consumer Price Indices
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Food and general consumer price indices. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Prices Paid by Farmers
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Prices of inputs paid by agricultural producers. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Land Use
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Land area by type of use: agricultural, forest, other. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Fertilizers - Nutrient
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Fertilizer use by nutrient (N, P2O5, K2O) per country. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Temperature Change
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Land surface temperature change by country. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Emissions Totals
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Greenhouse gas emissions from agriculture, land use, and energy. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Emissions from Crop Residues
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Emissions from burning and decomposing crop residues. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Emissions from Agriculture
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Emissions from enteric fermentation, manure, rice cultivation. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Emissions from Synthetic Fertilizers
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: N2O emissions from fertilizer application. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Food Security Indicators
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Prevalence of undernourishment, food insecurity, dietary energy supply. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Population
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Annual population estimates by country (UN source). Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Investment - Credit
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Credit to agriculture and government expenditure on agriculture. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Employment Indicators
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Employment in agriculture by sex and status. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Forestry Production and Trade
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Roundwood, sawnwood, panels, pulp, paper production and trade. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: Fishery and Aquaculture Production
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: Capture fisheries and aquaculture production by species and country. Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: FAOSTAT: SDG Indicators
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
description: FAO custodian SDG indicators (2.1, 2.4, 5.a, 6.4, 12.3, 14, 15). Coverage: 245+ countries, 1961-present (varies by domain).

name: ILOSTAT: Employment
description: Employment-to-population ratio, employment by sector, status, sex. Approximately 200 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: Unemployment
description: Unemployment rate, unemployed persons, duration, youth. Approximately 150 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: Working-age Population
description: Population by sex, age, urban/rural. Approximately 50 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: Earnings and Labour Cost
description: Average wages, minimum wages, labour cost indices. Approximately 100 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: Occupational Safety and Health
description: Occupational injuries, fatal/non-fatal, by economic activity. Approximately 50 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: Collective Bargaining
description: Trade union density, collective bargaining coverage. Approximately 30 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: Social Protection
description: Social protection coverage, expenditure, benefits. Approximately 80 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: Labour Migration
description: Migrant worker stocks and flows by destination and origin. Approximately 40 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: Consumer Price Indices
description: General and food CPI for ILO member states. Approximately 30 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: Labour Force
description: Labour force participation rate by sex and age. Approximately 100 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: Working Poverty
description: Working poverty rates and counts by sex. Approximately 30 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: SDG Labour Market Indicators
description: ILO-custodian SDG indicators (Goals 1, 5, 8, 10). Approximately 50 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: Informal Employment
description: Informal employment rates by sex, sector, status. Approximately 40 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: Working Time
description: Average weekly hours, excessive working time. Approximately 40 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: ILOSTAT: Child Labour
description: Child labour incidence, hazardous work, by sex and age. Approximately 30 indicators. Coverage: 189 countries, varies by indicator.

name: UNESCO UIS: Education
description: Enrollment, completion, literacy, teachers, expenditure at all levels. Approximately 3000 indicators across 200+ countries.

name: UNESCO UIS: Science, Technology & Innovation
description: R&D expenditure, researchers, patents, publications. Approximately 500 indicators across 200+ countries.

name: UNESCO UIS: Culture
description: Cultural employment, trade in cultural goods, World Heritage sites, museums. Approximately 300 indicators across 200+ countries.

name: UNESCO UIS: Communication & Information
description: Press freedom, media development indicators, internet access. Approximately 200 indicators across 200+ countries.

name: data.world Community Datasets
description: Community data platform with thousands of free datasets. Supports in-browser SQL queries, API access, and data collaboration. Requires free account. Hosts government, health, education, environment, and user-contributed datasets.
note: API requires authentication. Sign up at data.world for free access.
